'1' can correspond to some condition

There was need for programming languages

language is supposed to have

more elements of natural language and
it's supposed to make

the life of a programmer a lot more easier

all the detailed low level specifications of the

There are two possible execution models

Some languages are called compiled

for these languages we would have a

compiler. Compiler will be different for

It will also be different for different

Compiler will take your program written

exe files are executable files on

is called compilation basically compiler

There is another execution model for

Unlike compilers interpreters do not
